name: PDCA Cycle (Plan-Do-Check-Act)
what_it_is: A continuous improvement loop for systematic evidence-based optimization of any process.
core_mechanic: Plan (identify problem, design change hypothesis), Do (implement at small scale), Check (measure results against hypothesis), Act (standardize if successful; redesign if not). Most improvement efforts skip Check - that's the failure mode.
when_to_use: Improving a repeating process where you have data / Past optimization attempts haven't stuck / Systematic quality improvement across any operational domain
when_not_to_use: One-time decisions / Strategic direction questions / No baseline measurement exists
ideaos_application: Agent 3 writes the full PDCA cycle for the specific optimization - Plan hypothesis, smallest possible Do test, Check metric, Act criteria. Makes the Do step small enough to run within 2 weeks.
